signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, missing market forecasts of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid global energy volatility from the Iran/Middle East conflict.[1]  
This March data, released around early April 2026, aligns
